note: Official monthly subscription list prices, USD, keyed by provider then by the plan name the quota probe reports in account_label (matched case-insensitively). Used ONLY for the display-only 'API-equivalent value ≈ N× plan price' framing in the Stats panel — it never affects the token cost estimate (those rates live in model_prices.json). Unlike per-token API prices these consumer plan tiers are public and stable, so this rarely changes; an unrecognised label resolves to null (the UI omits the comparison rather than show a wrong number). Companion to model_prices.json; same human-reviewed update discipline.
